messages.text:
⚠️ Attention everyone!

Please do not forget to mark your attendance. Make sure to check in during the morning and check out before leaving in the evening. Please take care of both.

⚠️ Attention everyone!

Please do not forget to mark your attendance. Make sure to check in during the morning and check out before leaving in the evening.

Also, please make sure to fill out the Daily Work Report Sheet before leaving.
